problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
